# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account. Must be between 3 and 24 characters in length and use numbers and lower-case letters only."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account."
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS",
        "Premium_LRS",
        "Premium_ZRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU of the storage account."
      }
    },
    "indexDocument": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "index.html",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the index document (e.g., 'index.html') for static website hosting."
      }
    },
    "errorDocument404Path": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "404.html",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The path to the custom 404 error document (e.g., '404.html') for static website hosting."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": true
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "blobServices",
          "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
          "name": "default",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "isStaticWebsiteEnabled": true,
            "indexDocument": "[parameters('indexDocument')]",
            "errorDocument404Path": "[parameters('errorDocument404Path')]"
          },
          "resources": [
            {
              "type": "containers",
              "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
              "name": "$web",
              "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
              ],
              "properties": {
                "publicAccess": "Blob"
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "staticWebsiteEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2022-09-01').primaryEndpoints.web]"
    }
  }
}
